positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring silhouetted stylized deer and elegant ethereal trees against a vibrant gradient sky of deep sapphire, turquoise, and gold. The composition is centrally focused, utilizing high contrast between the dark, intricate silhouettes and the luminous background. Incorporate delicate geometric patterns (like mandalas or repeating constellations) subtly layered into the sky and foliage. The overall aesthetic is mystical, serene, and highly detailed, designed as a seamless, circular repeating pattern that looks excellent on fabric. Style: Vector illustration, line art, highly saturated colors, graphic novel quality, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, noise, sketch, photo, realistic, signature
